performance.title: Performance
performance.underserved.title: Under-served students
landing.hero.sub: Soundcheck tracks every student's reps and certifies them stage-ready — before they get booked on a real gig. A student-performance system that happens to schedule events.
landing.hero.micro: Built with IMDJ DJSchool · Taipei · no card to start
landing.trust.label: Built with the DJ school shaping the next generation of DJs
landing.insight.mut: A gradebook can't tell you if a student can hold a room. A calendar just tells you when.
landing.insight.main: Soundcheck tracks the one thing a DJ school is actually selling —
landing.insight.northStar: Soundcheck turns practice into stage time.
landing.how.title: Three moves, from first lesson to first gig.
landing.how.subtitle: The whole loop a school runs — logging reps, deciding who's ready, and putting them on a real bill — in one place instead of three spreadsheets.
landing.how.s1.d: Every practice set, classroom session, and live slot is logged as a performance credit. The student's whole history of time-on-the-decks, in one timeline.
landing.how.s2.d: Instructors sign off on skills — beatmatching, reading a room, a clean transition. Pass the soundcheck and the student is cleared. No clearance, no booking.
landing.how.s3.d: Cleared students drop onto a real lineup — a school night, a partner venue, a paid gig. The schedule writes itself from who's actually ready.
landing.feat.title: Everything a school needs to run performance — and nothing it doesn't.
landing.feat.credits.d: A running ledger of every set a student has played — practice, classroom, and live. The proof of reps that a certificate alone can't show.
landing.feat.gates.d: Define what "ready" means per level. Bookings stay locked until the student clears the gate — the school's standards, enforced automatically.
landing.feat.lineup.d: Build a night from your cleared roster. Slots, set times, and venues — a booking board that only shows students who've earned the spot.
landing.feat.cards.d: Each student's readiness, credits, and certifications on one card — the thing they show a venue, and the thing a parent actually understands.
landing.feat.console.d: Sign off skills, approve credits, and see the whole cohort's readiness at a glance. Built for the person actually teaching, not an admin.
landing.feat.taipei.d: Traditional Chinese throughout, not bolted on. Status pills, names, and rosters tested in Traditional Chinese from day one.
landing.status.title: One status, understood by everyone in the room.
landing.status.body: Student, instructor, venue, parent — they all read the same three states. Cleared, pending, or blocked. Never color alone: each carries a shape and a word, so the meaning survives a dark booth and a color-blind admin.
landing.records.title: The booth at night. The gradebook by day.
landing.records.subtitle: Switch to admin mode and Soundcheck reads like a system a school can hand its student records to — clean tables, correct numbers, nothing lost.
landing.quote.a: "Our whole mission is turning classroom hours into real stage time. Soundcheck is the first tool that
landing.quote.lit: measures the part that actually matters
landing.quote.b: — and tells a student, honestly, when they're ready."
landing.quote.name: Why we built Soundcheck
landing.quote.role: with our design partner, IMDJ DJSchool · Taipei
landing.cta.body: See Soundcheck on your own cohort. A 20-minute walkthrough, your students, your standards.
landing.footer.blurb: The performance platform for DJ schools. Built with IMDJ DJSchool in Taipei, for the schools turning students into working DJs.
landing.footer.product.title: Product
